73.source:
use transact;

// CHAIN_ID is injected by scripts/build.sh at compile time. Do not hardcode.
global CHAIN_ID: u32 = 84532;
global LEVELS: u32 = 23;
global N_INS: u32 = 4;
global N_OUTS: u32 = 4;
global INDEXED_LEVELS: u32 = 15;
global N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS: u32 = 8;
global N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS: u32 = 16;

fn main(
    root: pub Field,
    public_amount: pub Field,
    ext_data_hash: pub Field,
    recipient: pub Field,
    deposit_funder: pub Field,
    expiry_block_number: pub Field,
    is_deposit: Field,
    deposit_id_slots: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    public_deposit_id_deltas: pub [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    compliance_signature: [Field; 4],
    compliance_deposit_id: Field,
    compliance_pubkey_x: pub Field,
    compliance_pubkey_y: pub Field,
    in_nullifier: pub [Field; N_INS],
    in_amount: [Field; N_INS],
    in_pubkey_x: Field,
    in_pubkey_y: Field,
    in_transaction_signature: [Field; 4],
    in_blinding: [Field; N_INS],
    in_nullifier_secret: [Field; N_INS],
    token: Field,
    in_note: [Field; N_INS],
    in_path_indices: [Field; N_INS],
    in_path_elements: [[Field; LEVELS]; N_INS],
    in_sub_deposit_ids: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_INS],
    in_sub_deposit_amounts: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_INS],
    out_commitment: pub [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_amount: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_pubkey_hash: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_blinding: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_nullifier_secret: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_note: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_sub_deposit_ids: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_OUTS],
    out_sub_deposit_amounts: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_OUTS],
) {
    transact::circuit::<CHAIN_ID, LEVELS, INDEXED_LEVELS, N_INS, N_OUTS, N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS, N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS>(
        root,
        public_amount,
        ext_data_hash,
        recipient,
        deposit_funder,
        expiry_block_number,
        is_deposit,
        deposit_id_slots,
        public_deposit_id_deltas,
        compliance_signature,
        compliance_deposit_id,
        compliance_pubkey_x,
        compliance_pubkey_y,
        in_nullifier,
        in_amount,
        in_pubkey_x,
        in_pubkey_y,
        in_transaction_signature,
        in_blinding,
        in_nullifier_secret,
        token,
        in_note,
        in_path_indices,
        in_path_elements,
        in_sub_deposit_ids,
        in_sub_deposit_amounts,
        out_commitment,
        out_amount,
        out_pubkey_hash,
        out_blinding,
        out_nullifier_secret,
        out_note,
        out_sub_deposit_ids,
        out_sub_deposit_amounts,
    )
}
